title: Mollie.
content:
Mollie's frock is crimson,
        Her petticoat's of lace;
    Mollie's hair is golden,
        And curls about her face.

    Mollie's friends are many,
        She's off to visit one;
    Mollie takes her sunshade,
        To keep away the sun.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "Mollie."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
